benefits.description: Started for old injuries and health improvement

side_effects.description: Wasp sting-like sensation at injection site, mildly uncomfortable immediately after injection, then progresses to significant pain. Bruising, swelling, and itching. Pain increases at steady rate for first 16 hours post-injection. Pain severe enough to prevent sleep.

protocol_notes: KLOW blend (GHK-Cu component identified). 5 injections over 7 days, testing different injection sites (love handles/upper glute). Dose stated as 4mg total, which breaks down to 2.5mg GHK-Cu. Already taking Zyrtec daily for allergies. Peptide naive, beginning peptide journey.
